title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
# Financing Minor Irrigation Schemes Account is a great way to get more for your money
Bank provides financial assistance for exploitation of ground water (sinking of well), water lifting devices and distribution arrangement also. The target group is all types of farmers (small / marginal / other farmer) either individually or alongwith co-owner of the land.

metadata.description: IDBI Bank offers a wide range of products from savings and current bank account to loans for retail and msme customers  or agri loans to farmers. Apply Now.
metadata.keywords: Internet Banking, savings account, Debit Card, personal loans, home loans, loans, fixed deposits
